@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "antrea-6311-use-buildx-and-hpc-image-to-build-antrea-windows-images",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "antrea: Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images",
+    "description": "Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current antrea deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your antrea version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nhelm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working antrea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review antrea configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nkubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea\n```\nAs we already remove the support on Docker runtime on Windows since Antrea v2.0, we could assume that antrea-agent is running as a host process container on Windows Node using Containerd runtime ( we"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images",
+        "description": "The changes in this patch include,\n1. Use Windows hpc as the base image to store Antrea binary and OVS files\n2. Use doocker buildx to build Windows image on Linux base environment\n3. Modify OVS init container to install redist files\n4. Place openssl dll files into OVS binary directory instead of\n```yaml\n--cache-to type=registry,ref=$image-cache:$BUILD_TAG,mode=max\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nkubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The changes in this patch include,\n1. Use Windows hpc as the base image to store Antrea binary and OVS files\n2. Use doocker buildx to build Windows image on Linux base environment\n3. Modify OVS init container to install redist files\n4. Place openssl dll files into OVS binary directory instead of Windows system\n    path\n5.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "--cache-to type=registry,ref=$image-cache:$BUILD_TAG,mode=max",
+        "--cache-from type=registry,ref=$image-cache:$BUILD_TAG,mode=max"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
